---
title: "Mary Grafton Moberly"
---

## Mary Grafton Moberly

**Dates:** (b. St Petersburg 1849/50)

### Description

contributor to <i>MP</i> (1874)

### Biography

She and her mother ran a school in Hove in 1871;  she married 1882 George Bennett.  Her father’s name was Charles Moberly and he was probably a brother or nephew of the Rt. Rev. George Moberly.

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
